modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error adding Coyote Card in GrubHub app results in blank screen.

full_description_text: User attempts to set up Coyote Card in GrubHub app. Encountered a blank screen during the process. Received error messages indicating a failure to add the campus card. The card number seems to be unrecognized by the provider.
short_description: Error adding Coyote Card in GrubHub app results in blank screen.
description: User attempts to set up Coyote Card in GrubHub app. Encountered a blank screen during the process. Received error messages indicating a failure to add the campus card. The card number seems to be unrecognized by the provider.
